citations: SPEC.md L1-L4 (single source of truth declaration)
SPEC.md L181-L205 (folder structure / design element homes)
SPEC.md L200, L235 (82-test count and acceptance benchmark)
summary: Authored P1 deliverable 01-requirements/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md (244 lines) — a bidirectional Requirements Traceability Matrix covering all 8 functional requirements (FR-01..FR-08) of the kokoro-taiwan-proxy control group. Each row links FR → SRS.md §3 section → planned design element under src/ (per SPEC.md §7) → planned test file under tests/ (using the tests/test_fr_<NN>_<slug>.py convention). Forward matrix: 8/8 FRs mapped (100%). Reverse traceability: 10 test files planned, all reachable from their FRs (FR-03 and FR-04 each have a proposed second test file to keep fixtures focused; 1-to-N FR→test is allowed by the naming convention). Bidirectional coverage: 8/8 FRs reachable from at least one test (100%); 10/10 test files reachable from an FR (100%). Includes ASPICE SWE.3/SYS.4 compliance note, per-FR forward-link detail, reverse-link summary, coverage analysis with gaps & known unknowns (cross-referenced to SPEC_TRACKING.md open questions), and a v1.0 change log.
